ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical element */,
  "iupac_symbol" TEXT /* IUPAC symbol for the element */,
  "siegbahn_symbol" TEXT /* Siegbahn symbol for the element */,
  "atomic_number" INTEGER /* Atomic number of the element */,
  "atomic_weight" REAL /* Atomic weight of the element */,
  "electronic_configuration" TEXT /* Electronic configuration of the element */,
  "state_of_matter" TEXT /* State of matter (solid, liquid, gas) at room temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_characteristics" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element being characterized */,
  "initial_level" TEXT /* Initial energy level of the emission */,
  "final_level" TEXT /* Final energy level of the emission */,
  "emission_energy" REAL /* Energy of the emitted photon */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the emission */,
  "wavelength" REAL /* Wavelength of the emitted photon */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at which the emission was recorded */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure at which the emission was recorded */,
  "experimental_conditions" TEXT /* Additional experimental conditions or notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_characteristics_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy level entry */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element related to the energy level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy level */,
  "level_type" TEXT /* Type of the energy level (e.g., K, L) */,
  "energy_value" REAL /* Energy value of the level in electron volts (eV) */,
  "half_life" REAL /* Half-life of the energy level, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_levels_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, technician) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher conducting the experiment */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the element being studied */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for the experiment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results obtained from the analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for the analysis */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used for analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis results */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used to validate the results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who authored the publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication appeared */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "co_authors" TEXT /* List of co-authors of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the publication has been cited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the instrument */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the instrument was acquired */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the instrument */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the instrument */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment utilizing the instrument */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used */,
  "usage_start" TEXT /* Start time of instrument usage */,
  "usage_end" TEXT /* End time of instrument usage */,
  "usage_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose for which the instrument was used */,
  "usage_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instrument_usage_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "researcher1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first researcher */,
  "researcher2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second researcher */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborative project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., research, publication) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher2_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher2_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_researcher1_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher1_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
